title: Secure delivery partner/steward + independent methods/framing audit of shipped outputs
context: The project is not 'shipped' on merge — it is shipped when a real organization uses an analysis to inform a program, report, grant, or decision. This task secures the delivery partner and steward and completes an independent audit of the shipped analytical outputs (methods, framing, provenance, suppression, licenses) before delivery. The dated partner-acquisition plan requires a partner/steward secured by 2026-12-31; if none by ~2027-03-31 the build-vs-pivot decision rule applies. Depends on: disparities-analysis-brief-011, disparities-analysis-report-012, disparities-analysis-reproduce-013.
objective: Secure a real delivery partner/steward (an NCI-designated cancer center COE office, community cancer coalition, patient-advocacy organization, state/county public-health department, or academic health-equity research group) and complete an independent methods + framing audit of the shipped outputs. The steward is assigned and verifiedNeed flips to true. The independent audit re-confirms licenses, suppression, provenance, and non-stigmatizing framing on all shipped artifacts. Record the partner engagement and audit outcomes. The partner-acquisition plan requires ≥3 candidate organizations in active conversation by 2026-08-31 and a partner/steward confirmed by 2026-12-31.
acceptanceCriteria: A real organization is secured as the delivery partner and steward: an NCI-designated cancer center COE office, community cancer coalition, patient-advocacy organization, state/county public-health department, or academic health-equity research group
The steward is named and their role (owns the partner relationship, records outcomes) is documented in the project governance log
An independent methods audit is completed and recorded: confirms age-standardization, CIs, suppression, provenance completeness, and license compliance on all shipped analytical outputs

An independent framing audit is completed and recorded: confirms non-stigmatizing framing, reference-group policy, evidence-tiered structural framing, intersectional-suppression disclosure, and 'not medical advice' framing on any public-facing piece

The partner-acquisition plan milestones are documented: ≥3 candidate organizations in active conversation by 2026-08-31 and partner/steward confirmed by 2026-12-31 (or a build-vs-pivot decision record if the deadline passes)
verifiedNeed is updated to true in the project governance once the partner is confirmed
output: A partner-acquisition and audit document recording the secured delivery partner/steward, the independent methods + framing audit outcomes, license and suppression re-confirmation, and the governance record updating verifiedNeed to true.
